bear.summary: Supply additions and project timing compress the assumed thematic premium before transformer-specific free cash flow is visible.

base.summary: Broad Electrification execution improves, but the AI-transformer contribution remains too aggregated to validate.

bull.summary: Pricing, throughput, and mix exceed the sensitivity assumptions while capacity additions arrive without large capital intensity.

unverified_critical_multipliers: AI transformer units attributable to GEV
transformer content and qualified attainable share
incremental gross margin and working-capital conversion

kill_switches.condition: Reclassify the industry constraint as resolving if two independent official sources show standard transformer delivery times at or below 12 months.
kill_switches.metric: standard quoted delivery time in months
kill_switches.source: utility procurement disclosure plus manufacturer delivery disclosure

kill_switches.condition: Reject the GEV rent-capture path if transformer-specific revenue and incremental FCF cannot be bridged after the next two reporting cycles.
kill_switches.source: GEV regulatory filings and independently sourced customer or capacity evidence

kill_switches.condition: Reject the AI-specific causal claim if verified data-center projects are not a material driver of qualified transformer orders.
kill_switches.metric: share of qualified transformer order growth attributable to verified data-center projects
kill_switches.source: customer procurement plus supplier order disclosure

notes: The decision is subordinate to the no_material_revenue_bridge hard flag.
Scenario returns use the explicit $325 reference-anchor assumption in C-011; it is not asserted to be the actual cutoff closing price.
No score or scenario implies an order, leverage, guaranteed return, or a claim of alpha.
